name: toxel
flavor_texts: It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin. If you touch this Pokémon, a tingling sensation follows.
It manipulates the chemical makeup of its poison to produce electricity. The voltage is weak, but it can cause a tingling paralysis.
text: Toxel is the Baby Pokémon. It is a electric and poison-type Pokémon. Abilities: rattled, static, klutz (hidden). Base stats — HP: 40, Attack: 38, Defense: 35, Sp. Atk: 54, Sp. Def: 35, Speed: 40. Evolution line: toxel → toxtricity. Lore: It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin. If you touch this Pokémon, a tingling sensation follows. It manipulates the chemical makeup of its poison to produce electricity. The voltage is weak, but it can cause a tingling paralysis.
